questions.question: Describe the primary difference between supervised and unsupervised learning. Provide an example of each. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the key characteristics of each type of learning.

questions.question: What is the significance of the vanishing gradient problem in deep neural networks? How have you addressed this issue in a recent deep learning project? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Provide specific details and examples to support your answer.

questions.question: What is the main difference between a policy network and a value network in reinforcement learning? Provide an example of when you might use each. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the key characteristics of each type of network.
